name: Video Game Controller Gaming
desc: The universal symbol for console play and interactive entertainment. Perfect for game reviews, playstation/xbox updates, and general hobbyist content.

name: Retro Joystick Arcade Gaming
desc: Represents classic titles and the golden age of arcades. High SEO value for retro gaming communities, emulator discussions, and nostalgia-driven posts.

name: Mechanical Keyboard PC Gaming
desc: The primary icon for the 'master race' of computer players. Ideal for setup tours, competitive play, and hardware enthusiast content.

name: Computer Mouse Esports Gaming
desc: Symbolizes precision and competitive skill in FPS and MOBA titles. Targeted at pro-players, peripherals reviews, and aim-training tips.

name: Headset Audio Communication Gaming
desc: Represents team communication and immersive sound. Essential for streaming gear guides, multiplayer coordination, and Discord community topics.

name: Alien Pixel Monster Retro Gaming
desc: A tribute to 8-bit graphics and early software design. Great for indie game development, pixel art, and vintage software aesthetics.

name: Tournament Trophy Esports Gaming
desc: The symbol for competitive wins and league championships. Perfect for tournament announcements, rank-up celebrations, and esports news.

name: Mobile Smartphone Portable Gaming
desc: Highlights the massive mobile market and handheld play. Useful for app store trends, casual games, and high-performance gaming phones.

name: Desktop Monitor Workstation Gaming
desc: Represents high-refresh-rate displays and immersive visuals. Often used for 'battlestation' showcases and graphics card benchmarks.

name: Explosive TNT Action Gaming
desc: A metaphor for action-packed gameplay or sandbox destruction. Popular in Minecraft communities and tactical shooter discussions.

name: Crossed Swords RPG Gaming
desc: The icon for fantasy adventures, MMORPGs, and combat mechanics. Ideal for lore discussions, character builds, and quest logs.

name: Streaming Signal Live Gaming
desc: Represents broadcasting live play to an audience. Essential for Twitch and YouTube creators, stream schedules, and online connectivity.
